commands.review_summary:
The PR adds direct and nested `UND_ERR_SOCKET` detection plus a single guarded model fetch retry, with local-service lease release on retry success and failure paths.

PR surface: Source +43. Total +43 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level behavior: current main routes Anthropic Messages through guarded fetch, guarded fetch rethrows fetch failures, and the create-stage retry helper is not enabled by default. I did not live-reproduce the multi-hour stale-socket condition in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus maintainer acceptance of shared transport retry scope, not an automation-safe repair alone.
